---
applyTo: "data/aoe4/data/canonical/**"
---

# Canonical Data Outputs

These files are auto-generated by `scripts/build_canonical_data.ps1`. Do not edit manually.

## Identity Model

- **Canonical identity** = `baseId` (e.g., `"archer"`, `"man-at-arms"`, `"counterweight-trebuchet"`)
- **Variants** = `attribName` values (e.g., `"unit_archer_2_abb"`, `"unit_archer_3_eng"`)
- Every attribName, slug, display name, and pbgid resolves back to a baseId

## Files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `alias-map.json` | 7-index lookup: byBaseId, byAttribName, bySlug, byDisplayName, byPbgId, byClass, byProducedBy |
| `canonical-units.json` | One entry per baseId with merged civs, age spread, classes, producers |
| `canonical-buildings.json` | One entry per baseId building with merged civs, age, classes |
| `upgrade-chains.json` | Per-baseId age-tier stat progression (HP/damage/armor deltas) |
| `weapon-profiles.json` | Weapon archetypes per baseId (type, damage, range, speed, modifiers) |
| `weapon-catalog.json` | Standalone weapon catalog — all 1,388 weapon instances across civs/ages |
| `core-templates.json` | 171 core template defaults (hitpoints, costs, sight, build time) — inheritance parents |
| `inheritance-map.json` | 2,846 entity→parent links with core defaults + override counts |
| `tier-chains.json` | 424 entities with tier upgrade chains (upgrade PBG → next-tier EBP + SBP) |
| `unit-weapon-linkage.json` | 1,123 entities linked to weapon blueprints (WBP paths) |
| `entity-lifecycle.json` | 2,846 unified per-entity catalog: inherited defaults + tier chains + weapon links |
| `ha-variant-deltas.json` | 895 HA variant entities: 9 variants with parent mappings + override counts |
| `neutral-entities.json` | 18 neutral + cheat entities (trade posts, seasonal, photon_man) |
| `production-graph.json` | Producer -> unit/tech relationships with civ coverage |
| `static-truth.json` | Behavioral classification derived from static weapon/class data (not live runtime) |

## Lookup Pattern

To resolve any identifier to canonical form:
1. Try `alias-map.json → byBaseId[id]` (direct hit)
2. Try `alias-map.json → byAttribName[attribName]` → returns baseId
3. Try `alias-map.json → bySlug[slug]` → returns baseId
4. Try `alias-map.json → byDisplayName[name]` → returns baseId[] (may be multi-match)

## Regeneration

```powershell
.\scripts\build_canonical_data.ps1                     # canonical stages (alias, units, weapons, production, upgrades, truth)
.\scripts\build_canonical_data.ps1 -Stages "alias"     # single stage
.\scripts\generate_all_data.ps1                        # blueprint tables + canonical-buildings + weapon-catalog + cross-reference + inheritance + lifecycle + gap-fill
.\scripts\extract_inheritance.ps1                      # core-templates.json + inheritance-map.json (also called by generate_all_data Phase 5)
.\scripts\extract_tier_chains.ps1                      # tier-chains.json + unit-weapon-linkage.json (also called by generate_all_data Phase 6)
.\scripts\build_entity_lifecycle.ps1                   # entity-lifecycle.json (also called by generate_all_data Phase 7)
.\scripts\fill_blueprint_gaps.ps1                      # per-civ EBP gap fill from XML dump (also called by generate_all_data Phase 8)
.\scripts\extract_ha_deltas.ps1                        # ha-variant-deltas.json + per-variant files (also called by generate_all_data Phase 9)
.\scripts\merge_neutral_entities.ps1                   # neutral-entities.json + blueprint update (also called by generate_all_data Phase 10)
.\scripts\validate_data.ps1                             # audit report
```
